op5e.settings.berriesWeightless.name: Weightless Berries
op5e.settings.berriesWeightless.hint: When enabled, Berries do not count toward encumbrance (even if the GM has currency weight enabled).
op5e.diamondSoul.dialogContent: This save failed. Spend 1 spirit point to reroll? ({remaining} spirit remaining)
op5e.combatMedicine.redirectNotice: Field Surgeon: using Combat Medicine instead of base Experimental Medicine.
op5e.relentlessRage.dialogContent: You dropped to 0 HP while raging. Make a DC {dc} Constitution save to drop to 1 HP instead?
op5e.relentlessRage.success: Relentless Rage succeeds — you are at 1 HP. Next save DC: {dc}.
op5e.relentlessRage.failure: Relentless Rage failed — you remain at 0 HP.
op5e.hakiAdvancement.invalidChoice: That Haki feat is not available for your current branches. Upgrade a branch you started, or begin a new branch at Novice.
op5e.flameInvesture.dialogContent: Cast a flame creation granted by this trait.
op5e.flameInvesture.noSpells: No Flame Investure creations found on this actor.
op5e.flameInvesture.noFireballUses: No Fireball uses remaining until a long rest.
op5e.flameInvesture.missingSpell: That creation is not on your character sheet.
op5e.bubbleFloater.applied: Bubble Floater active (8 hours, +20 ft walk).
op5e.giantsEndurance.noRecentDamage: Use Giant's Endurance after you take damage (reaction).
